title: Hypothesis Evidence Scorecard: Synthesizing Iterations 1-3 Experimental Results
summary: Demo notebook that evaluates 5 hypothesis claims (H1-H5) against 3 iteration-3 experiments from circuit motif spectroscopy research. Loads pre-extracted experiment metadata and examples from mini_demo_data.json (52KB, containing exp1 metadata, 17 exp2 examples, 10 exp3 examples). Scores each hypothesis on a 5-level scale, generates an overall verdict (Partially Confirmed, mean=0.41), paper narrative recommendations, and a prioritized gap list with 3 must-fix items. Produces a 3-panel visualization showing hypothesis scores, research gaps, and key metrics.
